findings.title: --simple flag is a stub with no behavioral implementation
findings.resolution: Implemented 3-layer fix: (1) Added simple field to auto-mode.json session marker in SKILL.md Step 1d, (2) Stop hook now reads simple flag and outputs minimal systemMessage when active, (3) Added Simple Mode section to auto SKILL.md with 5 behavioral instructions for the LLM

findings.title: AGENTS.md ORIGINAL section not cleaned up (~60 lines of duplication)
findings.resolution: Stripped ORIGINAL section from ~67 lines to ~15 lines. Kept only: Project Overview, coverage closing gate, manual acceptance categories, file limits. Removed duplicated: Key Rules, Principles, Structure, Creating/Completing workflows, Testing Pipeline table

findings.title: AGENTS.md Closing Increment contradicts SW section (missing grill gate)
findings.resolution: Removed the contradicting closing workflow entirely. Replaced with Project-Specific Gates section that only lists additional steps (coverage, manual acceptance) to run before /sw:done, complementing rather than contradicting the SW section

findings.title: COMPLETION message example mentions /sw:grill despite no-grill agent rule
findings.resolution: Changed COMPLETION example from '/sw:grill passed. Frontend increment ready for merge.' to 'Ready for team-lead closure.' in team-lead SKILL.md line 442

findings.title: Agent timeout mechanism (20min) is unimplementable as specified
findings.resolution: Reframed Section 8b from timer-based ('20 min') to turn-based heuristic ('has not messaged since team-lead last turn'). Added caveat that Claude Code has no built-in timers.

findings.title: AGENTS.md orchestration section numbering is 1,2,4,3
findings.resolution: Removed misnumbered section 4 (Large-Scale Changes) which was already covered in Non-Claude Tools section. Remaining sections now number 1, 2, 3 sequentially.
